subtitle: in spite of
explanation: Introduces a contrast — something happens despite an obstacle.
exampleRussian: Несмотря на усталость, она закончила работу.
exampleTranslation: In spite of being tired, she finished the work.

subtitle: so that / in order to
explanation: Purpose clause — links an action to its intended outcome.
exampleTranslation: I came early so that I would make it in time.

subtitle: although
explanation: Concessive clause — acknowledges a fact that does not prevent the main idea.
exampleTranslation: Although it was cold, we went for a walk.
